seo.title: Dinner Menu — Elevated Creole Kitchen | Louisiana Purchase North Park
seo.description: Chef Quinnton Austin's elevated Creole dinner menu at Louisiana Purchase in North Park, San Diego. Fire-charred oysters, Louisiana BBQ shrimp, and slow-built gumbo, served daily.
seo.schemaDescription: Chef Quinnton Austin's elevated Creole dinner menu at Louisiana Purchase in North Park, San Diego.

hero.title: Dinner
hero.subtitle: Chef Quinnton Austin's fire-forward Creole kitchen — fire-charred oysters, slow-built gumbo, and elevated Louisiana plates built for sharing.
hero.imageAlt: Dinner at Louisiana Purchase North Park San Diego

menuHeader.title: Raw, Fire,
menuHeader.subtitle: Chef Quinnton Austin's dinner program — fire-charred, slow-built, and obsessively precise.

cta.title: Reserve Your Table.
cta.subtitle: Louisiana Purchase is open daily at 2305 University Ave. Walk-ins welcome at the bar.
